text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, August 23. You have sprint planning at 10 AM, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has scheduling portal. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I've noted that. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping scheduling portal in the MVP. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 5th grade level now. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. Great update. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that went for a run around the neighborhood. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! Sleep quality is so important. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, Reviewing our household budget today. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. Smart financial planning. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: That is a clean implementation. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. That sounds critical. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /sms/send under load. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! That sounds critical. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /sms/send. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that helping Ethan with his homework tonight. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 5th grade level now. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. Great update. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: That sounds like a sweet moment. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Managing some allergy issues today. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. I've logged your vitals. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, Reviewing our household budget today. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Space science and tech is a great focus. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Understood. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
